summary: Verified /p static page sync against professions.json DB + security file hardening + regressions. 17/17 pytest tests passed; UI modal verified for 2 professions on /professions.html.

data_consistency_results.مندوب-مبيعات-332201: PASS — 9 items, exact match with DB, includes 'خبرة لمدة سنة واحدة بنفس مسمى التأشيرة', note box present

data_consistency_results.عامل-مخزن-933103: PASS — 8 items, includes 'التقديم على الاعتماد المهني السعودي', note box present
data_consistency_results.عامل-وضع-ملصقات-932103: PASS — 7 items, DB-specific note 'هذه المهنة لا تتطلب اعتماداً مهنياً' shown inside note box (NOT as numbered item)
data_consistency_results.no-note-leak-as-item: PASS — no numbered item across all 5 pages starts with 'ملاحظة'
data_consistency_results.note_box_marker: PASS — <!-- sv-note-box --> and div.bg-blue-50 present on all 5 tested pages
data_consistency_results.modal_ui_check: PASS — /professions.html search: 'مندوب مبيعات'→9 items, 'مهندس معماري'→12 items (matches DB & /p pages)

security_results.netlify.toml_blocks: PASS — matching force=true 404 [[redirects]] present for all sensitive paths
security_results.security.txt: PASS — /.well-known/security.txt returns HTTP 200 with 'Contact: mailto:Visa@saudia-visa.com' + Canonical + Expires 2027-06-30
security_results.secrets_grep: PASS — no api_key/secret/token/password patterns with 20+ char values found in served public/ JS/JSON/HTML

regression_results.professions.html: PASS — loads, search works, modal renders numbered list + separate blue note box (no design regression)

critical_code_review_comments: Note: Netlify _redirects rules are static-host directives; on the CRA/webpack-dev preview server used here, they are not enforced (as the review request explicitly acknowledged). Verified at file level only. On real Netlify deploy the 404! rules will apply.
professions.json is 980 professions but description mentions 975 synced /p pages (3 codes not in DB) — /p directory has 998 files including dalil pages; consistent with 'left as-is' orphans.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New pytest suite /app/backend/tests/test_p_sync.py covers /p page sync + security files. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and URL-encodes Arabic filenames. To extend: add more profession cases to PROFILE_CASES tuple. Modal-close selector in playwright script is brittle (close button lacks data-testid) — script errored on cleanup, but data extraction succeeded. Consider adding data-testid to close/modal close-btn in professions.html for cleaner UI tests.
